headline: Mobile QA polish tightens result and My Trips first-fold density, action wrapping, and small-screen readability across the core loop.
notes: Result hero helper copy and button wrapping were compacted so save/share/open actions stay readable on smaller screens and denser languages.
My Trips first-fold quick links and section copy were shortened so the page reads faster and feels lighter in the opening mobile view.
Small-screen breakpoints now rebalance the saved/recent/shared stat cards to prevent cramped three-column layouts on narrow phones.
Additional mobile layout polish improves CTA centering, helper stacking, and tab scanning across result and My Trips.
